sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 74

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 74:1
items.html:
(to the question) Na'ar lacking a Hey
When she receives the hinge and door and MANTZEPACH of ZA, which are Dinim (see Answer 28), she is then called Na'ar [lad], lacking a Hey. (Item 97)
